item.title: President Trump joins second lady Usha Vance's podcast to di…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: President Trump joins second lady Usha Vance's podcast to discuss a book about past presidents’ hobbies and exercise habits, joking about former President William Taft.
item.content:encoded: President Trump joins second lady Usha Vance's podcast to discuss a book about past presidents’ hobbies and exercise habits, joking about former President William Taft.

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Te…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called TeaKnights, and it looks so awesome 🥹 the game is a rhythm game and a rail shooter, and the graphics look really cool! The music was a vibe as well, it looks super fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月05日 日曜日☁☂️ 室温27.4℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠 汗でビショビショ…🫠 今日も1…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月05日　日曜日☁☂️
室温27.4℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠
汗でビショビショ…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

もうじき、七夕🎋なのにすっかり忘れてた…😂
今年の七夕イラストは無しです(笑)

今日のイラストは後でアップしますので。
item.content:encoded:
7月05日　日曜日☁☂️
室温27.4℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
あ〜蒸し暑かった〜🫠
汗でビショビショ…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

もうじき、七夕🎋なのにすっかり忘れてた…😂
今年の七夕イラストは無しです(笑)

今日のイラストは後でアップしますので。

item.title: お昼ごはん おにぎりとスープのセット おにぎりはお米がふっくらつやつや、スープは出汁に梅干しとレモンと大葉で爽やかに、、…
item.author: ぱん (@yyy950921.bsky.social)
item.description:
お昼ごはん
おにぎりとスープのセット
おにぎりはお米がふっくらつやつや、スープは出汁に梅干しとレモンと大葉で爽やかに、、全体的にやさしい味付けなのも好み！
item.content:encoded:
お昼ごはん
おにぎりとスープのセット
おにぎりはお米がふっくらつやつや、スープは出汁に梅干しとレモンと大葉で爽やかに、、全体的にやさしい味付けなのも好み！

item.title: 【スパーダ】 自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。 目に光を与えないこと…
item.author: 朽木桜斎（くちき おうさい） (@kuchiki-ohsai.bsky.social)
item.description:
【スパーダ】

自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの　ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。

目に光を与えないことで虚無を表現できると山田玲司先生がおっしゃっておりました🤔
item.content:encoded:
【スパーダ】

自作小説に登場する56し屋・縫殿夢丸（ぬいどの　ゆめまる）くんのイメージ画です。

目に光を与えないことで虚無を表現できると山田玲司先生がおっしゃっておりました🤔

item.title: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but by an excess of human greed. Every tree saved is a step in the right direction.
item.content:encoded: The Earth is being destroyed not by a lack of resources, but by an excess of human greed. Every tree saved is a step in the right direction.

item.title: I asked a Norwegian fan at the World Cup match how so many o…
item.author: GS (@fundhuman.bsky.social)
item.description:
I asked a Norwegian fan at the World Cup match how so many of their fans can afford to spend the summer in America going to a bunch of expensive
World Cup games, and I shit you not he just goes “Our healthcare and school are free and our work is encouraging us to do so.”

Fuck man.
item.content:encoded:
I asked a Norwegian fan at the World Cup match how so many of their fans can afford to spend the summer in America going to a bunch of expensive
World Cup games, and I shit you not he just goes “Our healthcare and school are free and our work is encouraging us to do so.”

Fuck man.

item.title: Bad bosses typically have three traits in common — and they'…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description: Bad bosses typically have three traits in common — and they're all fixable, says Columbia Business School social psychologist Adam Galinsky.
item.content:encoded: Bad bosses typically have three traits in common — and they're all fixable, says Columbia Business School social psychologist Adam Galinsky.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 「メカの中」ではなく「メカの足元」に立つということ―『gen ATLAS』を見てよみがえった『ギガ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
「メカの中」ではなく「メカの足元」に立つということ―『gen ATLAS』を見てよみがえった『ギガンティック ドライブ』の興奮と、海外で愛され、しかし忘れられかけたサンドロットのメカゲーム【オリーさんのロボゲーコラム】 | Game*Spark - 国内・海外ゲーム情報サイト

先日、『アーマード・コア』シリーズへの独自の視点からの言及をきっかけに、多くの日本人から「ロボゲー・ロボアニメ詳しすぎな外国人」として知られるようになったオリー・バーダー氏。実は、氏はゲームやアニメを中心として日本サブカルを海外に長年伝えてきた記者であり、様々なタイトルにかかわってきたゲームクリ.
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
「メカの中」ではなく「メカの足元」に立つということ―『gen ATLAS』を見てよみがえった『ギガンティック ドライブ』の興奮と、海外で愛され、しかし忘れられかけたサンドロットのメカゲーム【オリーさんのロボゲーコラム】 | Game*Spark - 国内・海外ゲーム情報サイト

先日、『アーマード・コア』シリーズへの独自の視点からの言及をきっかけに、多くの日本人から「ロボゲー・ロボアニメ詳しすぎな外国人」として知られるようになったオリー・バーダー氏。実は、氏はゲームやアニメを中心として日本サブカルを海外に長年伝えてきた記者であり、様々なタイトルにかかわってきたゲームクリ.

item.title: おはようございます！(:D)┓ いつもの都営～ 【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下…
item.author: ヂーゼル機関車《masashi》 (@dieselloco.bsky.social)
item.description:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
いつもの都営～
【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下鉄が、日本の地下鉄最深 地下42.3mの駅に到着！
【笹塚駅】都営地下鉄新宿線10-300形。引上線とのからみで、線路の造形がおもしろい。
【大塚駅前停留場 付近】東京さくらトラム7700形(5月)🌹
【池袋陸橋】りんかい線71-000形(ほぼ都営)
#鉄道 #railway
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます！(:D)┓
いつもの都営～
【六本木駅】都営地下鉄大江戸線12-600形。鉄輪式のリニアモーター地下鉄が、日本の地下鉄最深 地下42.3mの駅に到着！
【笹塚駅】都営地下鉄新宿線10-300形。引上線とのからみで、線路の造形がおもしろい。
【大塚駅前停留場 付近】東京さくらトラム7700形(5月)🌹
【池袋陸橋】りんかい線71-000形(ほぼ都営)
#鉄道 #railway

item.title: SelectMarket in 札幌市民交流プラザにて、私の描いたイラストのグッズを販売しております！ 生き物や料理のグ…
item.author: 白頁夾コーギョ (@hakuyoukyokogyo.bsky.social)
item.description:
SelectMarket in 札幌市民交流プラザにて、私の描いたイラストのグッズを販売しております！
生き物や料理のグッズがいっぱい！ぜひお越しください！

日時 ： 2026/7/5(日) 　11:00～18:00
場所 ： 創世スクエアビル・札幌市民交流プラザ
#ハンドメイド　#イベント　#北海道
item.content:encoded:
SelectMarket in 札幌市民交流プラザにて、私の描いたイラストのグッズを販売しております！
生き物や料理のグッズがいっぱい！ぜひお越しください！

日時 ： 2026/7/5(日) 　11:00～18:00
場所 ： 創世スクエアビル・札幌市民交流プラザ
#ハンドメイド　#イベント　#北海道

item.title: Gaspésie, Quebec “Recognized by National Geographic Travele…
item.author: 🇨🇦 👊🇨🇦 (@sorry-iamcanadian.bsky.social)
item.description:
Gaspésie, Quebec

“Recognized by National Geographic Traveler as one of Canada’s 50 Places of a Lifetime, …

discover four national parks; famous Percé Rock…moose; summits over 1000 metres (3300 feet); lighthouses; Chaleur Bay…”

www.quebecmaritime.ca/en/discover-...

#Canada
#Quebec

item.title: Breaking News: President Trump called the head of FIFA days …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: President Trump called the head of FIFA days before the suspension of Folarin Balogun, the U.S.’s top goal scorer in the World Cup, was reversed. trib.al/x9mGfAs
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: President Trump called the head of FIFA days before the suspension of Folarin Balogun, the U.S.’s top goal scorer in the World Cup, was reversed. trib.al/x9mGfAs

item.title: House Speaker Mike Johnson said he plans to move quickly to …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson said he plans to move quickly to advance President Donald Trump’s signature voter ID legislation through the arduous budget reconciliation process once the House returns to Washington, downplaying the heightened tensions within the GOP.
item.content:encoded: House Speaker Mike Johnson said he plans to move quickly to advance President Donald Trump’s signature voter ID legislation through the arduous budget reconciliation process once the House returns to Washington, downplaying the heightened tensions within the GOP.

item.description: Trump praised FIFA after Folarin Balogun's World Cup ban was lifted, prompting online speculation.

item.title: The Kelpies are even more magnificent close up. Situated out…
item.author: Gerry Hassan (@gerryhassan.bsky.social)
item.description: The Kelpies are even more magnificent close up. Situated outside Falkirk they are the world's largest equine structures. Designed by Andy Scott & sitting by the Forth & Clyde Canal they are a tribute to Scotland's industrial heritage & the working horses that powered its canals.
item.content:encoded: The Kelpies are even more magnificent close up. Situated outside Falkirk they are the world's largest equine structures. Designed by Andy Scott & sitting by the Forth & Clyde Canal they are a tribute to Scotland's industrial heritage & the working horses that powered its canals.

item.title: As environmental challenges mount, many people are beginning…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: As environmental challenges mount, many people are beginning to rethink the true meaning of wealth. Perhaps the greatest treasures are not hidden underground at all. They are the living landscapes that sustain life itself and make our planet a place we can call home.
item.content:encoded: As environmental challenges mount, many people are beginning to rethink the true meaning of wealth. Perhaps the greatest treasures are not hidden underground at all. They are the living landscapes that sustain life itself and make our planet a place we can call home.

item.title: Summer in the Dolomites Grazing horses far up in South Tyro…
item.author: Kilian Schönberger (@kilianschoenberger.bsky.social)
item.description:
Summer in the Dolomites
Grazing horses far up in South Tyrol
#Dolomites #Dolomiti #Dolomiten
item.content:encoded:
Summer in the Dolomites
Grazing horses far up in South Tyrol
#Dolomites #Dolomiti #Dolomiten

item.title: A Casa Branca ligou para a FIFA e pediu que a entidade revis…
item.author: rei🚩 (@reispy.bsky.social)
item.description: A Casa Branca ligou para a FIFA e pediu que a entidade revisasse o cartão vermelho dado a Balogun. Hoje, saiu a notícia de que a FIFA suspendeu a punição do jogador estadunidense. Tem algo muito estranho acontecendo nesta Copa. 🧐🤔
item.content:encoded: A Casa Branca ligou para a FIFA e pediu que a entidade revisasse o cartão vermelho dado a Balogun. Hoje, saiu a notícia de que a FIFA suspendeu a punição do jogador estadunidense. Tem algo muito estranho acontecendo nesta Copa. 🧐🤔

item.title: One of the world's oldest wolf subspecies, the Himalayan wol…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: One of the world's oldest wolf subspecies, the Himalayan wolf treks extreme altitudes to bring food back to its pups. Family survival at its rawest.
item.content:encoded: One of the world's oldest wolf subspecies, the Himalayan wolf treks extreme altitudes to bring food back to its pups. Family survival at its rawest.

item.title: The awe inspiring Grundtvigskirken towers 2 km above iceberg…
item.author: Christoph Fischer Photography (@beautysurroundsyou.com)
item.description:
The awe inspiring Grundtvigskirken towers 2 km above icebergs at its base. Sailing through East Greenland's O-fjord, we were blessed with one breathtaking view after another. A privilege to witness!

#bluesky #photography #landscape #travel #nature
#landscapephotography #naturephotography #greenland
item.content:encoded:
The awe inspiring Grundtvigskirken towers 2 km above icebergs at its base. Sailing through East Greenland's O-fjord, we were blessed with one breathtaking view after another. A privilege to witness!

#bluesky #photography #landscape #travel #nature
#landscapephotography #naturephotography #greenland
